---
title: 'Projects'
subtitle: 'Data analysis & visualization projects using R/Python.'
# css: '../../src/styles/projects.css'
include-after-body: '../../src/scripts/responsive-tag-bar.html'
toc: false
sidebar: false
back-to-top-navigation: false
reading-meta-enabled: false

listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: "*/index.*md"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, categories, author, date]
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: "200px"
  image-align: left
  sort: "order asc"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 20
---
